generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the gantry crane system representing the base frame supporting all moving components"
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling the horizontal movement of the crane cart along the gantry beam"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling the vertical movement of the hoist and payload"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnetic component used to pick up and release container pucks"
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Microcontroller unit interfacing with motors, sensors, and electromagnet to execute control commands"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Power supply unit providing electrical power to all electronic components of the crane system"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures the swinging motion of the hoist using angular position data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed affecting crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collects position and velocity data of the crane cart and hoist"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance ControllerFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoController
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD model created in Autodesk Fusion 360 representing the physical structure of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model used for trajectory generation and simulation of crane kinematics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonEnabler
]

instance HistoricalCraneData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuously logged crane state including position, velocity, trajectories, and environmental conditions stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData, WindSpeedData, SwingAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance ControllerFeedbackDataLog : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical data from Arduino controller including motor commands and sensor feedback"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerFeedbackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PythonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming environment used for implementing control applications, logging, and crane interface"
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database optimized for storing and querying crane operational data with high temporal resolution"
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization platform for creating interactive dashboards showing crane state and operational metrics"
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker facilitating real-time communication between crane components and digital twin services"
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying database, MQTT broker, and dashboard services"
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller platform for sensor data acquisition and motor control"
]

instance KiCadEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Electronic design automation tool used for creating custom hardware shields for crane electronics"
]

// C6: Services
instance PhysicalCraneInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Python program connecting to crane controllers and facilitating communication via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateDataTransmission, ControllerFeedbackTransmission
]

instance ControlApplicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages crane control logic including trajectory following and motor command generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryExecution, FaultDetection
]

instance LoggingApplicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously logs crane state data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Uses kinematic model to generate smooth, efficient trajectories for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryGeneration
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane behavior and controller performance for testing and validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidation, ControllerPerformanceAnalysis
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares executed trajectories with simulations to detect deviations and notify operators"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryValidation
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides Grafana dashboard visualizing crane state and trajectory data in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateVisualization, TrajectoryVisualization
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs crane state, trajectories, and environmental conditions to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataPersistence, HistoricalAnalysis
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryGeneration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies the most efficient paths for crane movement based on kinematic constraints and environmental conditions"
]

instance FaultDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Classifies anomalies in crane behavior using time-series classification techniques"
]

instance TrajectoryValidation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Compares executed trajectories with simulated trajectories to detect performance deviations"
]

instance OperationalAlerts : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notifies operators of deviations or faults via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TrajectoryExecution : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes generated trajectories on the physical crane system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transmits real-time crane state data from physical system to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControllerFeedbackTransmission : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transmits controller feedback data from Arduino to digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuously logs crane state data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationValidation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validates real-time crane behavior against expected trajectories through simulation comparison"
]

instance ControllerPerformanceAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analyzes controller performance metrics through simulation testing"
]

instance CraneStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of crane state including position, velocity, and environmental conditions"
]

instance TrajectoryVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualizes executed and planned trajectories for operational monitoring"
]

instance DataPersistence : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensures long-term storage of crane operational data for historical analysis"
]

instance HistoricalAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enables analysis of past crane operations to identify patterns and improve future performance"
]

instance ParameterUpdates : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables adjustments to control strategies based on real-time data and simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin interacts with the physical system through:
  - **Optimal trajectory generation**: The Trajectory Generator Service computes trajectories for the crane to follow, ensuring minimal residual swinging motion.
  - **Control commands**: Sent from the Control Application to the Physical Crane Interface, which translates these commands to the crane's motors.
  - **Operator inputs**: Via the Human Machine Interface (HMI), operators can configure and control the crane."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates in real-time, with continuous synchronization between the physical and virtual systems. Data is logged and validated in real-time, and services like trajectory generation and validation are executed dynamically during crane operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin system is orchestrated as follows:
  - The **Physical Crane** is controlled via the **Physical Crane Interface** and **Control Application**.
  - The **Logging Application** continuously logs crane state to the **TimescaleDB Database**.
  - The **Trajectory Generator Service** computes optimal trajectories, which are executed by the **Control Application**.
  - The **Simulation Service** validates trajectories against real-time data, with results visualized in the **Grafana Dashboard**.
  - The **Continuous Validation Service** monitors deviations and alerts operators via the dashboard.
  - The **MQTT Broker** facilitates communication between services, ensuring real-time synchronization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the following lifecycle phases of the physical system:
  - **As operated**: The digital twin is primarily used for real-time monitoring, control, and validation of the crane during operation.
  - **As designed**: CAD models and kinematic models represent the crane's design, but the twin is not used for manufacturing validation in this exemplar."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The digital twin employs the following fidelity and validity mechanisms:
  - **Continuous validation**: Compares real-time crane trajectories with simulations to detect deviations.
  - **Distance metrics**: Quantifies discrepancies between executed and simulated trajectories.
  - **Threshold-based alerts**: Operators are notified if deviations exceed acceptable thresholds.
  - **Simulation accuracy**: The kinematic model and simulation service are validated against real-world crane behavior.
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Environmental factors (e.g., wind speed) are accounted for in simulations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical and digital twin includes:
  - **Network Protocols**: MQTT (via Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication.
  - **Data Transmission**: Real-time data (e.g., crane state, sensor readings) is transmitted from the Arduino to the Logging Application and other services.
  - **Control Commands**: Generated by the Control Application and sent to the Physical Crane Interface via Python."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Local Deployment**: All software runs on a single personal computer connected to the physical crane.
  - **Containerization**: The database, MQTT broker, and dashboard are containerized using Docker for easy setup and scalability.
  - **Python Module**: The gantrylib module bundles all Python applications, making it easy to install and extend via pip."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin exemplar adheres to the following standards and practices:
  - **Open-source licensing**: Published under the MIT license.
  - **Common technologies**: Uses widely adopted tools (e.g., Python, Docker, MQTT, TimescaleDB).
  - **C4 Model**: For architecture documentation.
  - **AutomationML**: Mentioned in related work but not directly used in this exemplar."
]
